products.name: Milwaukee M18 5 in. Random Orbit Sander
products.description: The Milwaukee M18 Random Orbit Sander delivers corded-level sanding performance at up to 12,000 OPM with variable speed control. It includes a dust canister and universal hose adapter for clean work, and runs about 35 minutes on an XC3.0 battery pack.
features: Variable speed dial for matching orbit speed to application
Hook-and-loop quick-change sanding pad
Universal hose adapter for dust collection
Compact ergonomic design for one-handed use
Compatible with all M18 REDLITHIUM batteries

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 5 in. Brushless Random Orbital Sander
products.description: The DeWalt DCW210B is a brushless 5-inch random orbit sander that runs from 8,000 to 12,000 OPM with a low-profile design for getting close to your work surface. Its one-handed locking dust bag and rubber overmold grip make it comfortable for extended sanding sessions.
features: Brushless motor for longer runtime and tool life
Low-profile height for precise work close to surfaces
One-handed locking dust bag for secure attachment
Rubber overmold grip for comfortable extended sanding
Variable speed dial for application-specific control

products.name: Makita 18V LXT 5 in. Variable Speed Random Orbit Sander
products.description: The Makita XOB01Z stands out with three distinct speed settings and a larger 1/8-inch orbit for fast, efficient sanding with a swirl-free finish. Its pad brake and controlled startup prevent common beginner mistakes like gouging, making it a forgiving sander for DIYers.
features: Three speed settings via one-touch electronic switch
Larger 1/8 in. orbit for fast material removal and swirl-free finish
Pad brake reduces free-spin for improved finish quality
Controlled startup system prevents gouging
Up to 40 minutes runtime on a single charge

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 5 in. Random Orbit Sander
products.description: At just $59, the Ryobi PCL406B is the most affordable cordless random orbit sander on the market. It delivers solid 10,000 OPM performance with 40% reduced vibration, weighs only 2.7 lbs, and fits the massive ONE+ battery ecosystem of 300+ tools.
features: 40% reduced vibration for comfortable extended use
Multiple grip zones for different hand positions
Rocker switch with rubber membrane for dust protection
Lightest in class at only 2.7 lbs bare
Compatible with 300+ ONE+ tools on the same battery

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 4-1/2 in. / 5 in. Angle Grinder (Paddle Switch)
products.description: The Milwaukee 2880-20 is a pro-grade cordless angle grinder that matches the power of an 11-amp corded grinder. Its electronic clutch provides kickback protection, and tool-free guard and accessory changes minimize downtime. Delivers up to 135 cuts per charge.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor delivers 11A corded equivalent performance
Electronic clutch for kickback protection
Overload protection to maximize motor life
Tool-free accessory and guard adjustments
Paddle switch with no-lock design for safety

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 4-1/2 in. Brushless Angle Grinder
products.description: The DeWalt DCG413B is a compact, lightweight angle grinder with standout safety features. Its Kickback Brake automatically shuts the grinder off during dangerous pinch or bind-up events, and the two-stage trigger prevents accidental activation. At 3.7 lbs, it is easy to handle for extended grinding sessions.
features: Kickback Brake engages when pinch, stall, or bind-up detected
Brake stops wheel in 2 seconds or less
Two-stage trigger requires two distinct actions to activate
Brushless motor for extended runtime and durability
Compact and lightweight at only 3.7 lbs

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 4-1/2 in. / 5 in. Cut-Off/Angle Grinder
products.description: The Makita XAG04Z features Automatic Speed Change Technology that intelligently adjusts speed and torque during use for optimal performance. Its Star Protection system allows the tool and battery to communicate in real time, preventing overload and overheating damage.
features: Automatic Speed Change Technology adjusts speed and torque during operation
BL Brushless motor for up to 50% longer runtime per charge
Star Protection communication technology prevents overload and overheat
Ideal for grinding, cutting, and sanding tile, concrete, and pipe
Compatible with Makita's extensive 18V LXT battery system

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 4-1/2 in. Angle Grinder
products.description: The Ryobi PCL445B is a budget-friendly cordless angle grinder that delivers 9,000 RPM of grinding power. Its 3-position handle, on-board wrench storage, and tool-free guard adjustment make it easy to use for occasional grinding, cutting, and surface prep tasks.
features: 9,000 RPM for efficient and rapid material removal
3-position handle for maximum control and adaptability
On-board wrench storage for hassle-free accessory changes
Tool-free adjustable guard for quick changes
Ergonomic design optimized for flush cutting

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Compact Router
products.description: The Milwaukee 2723-20 is widely considered the best cordless compact router available. It delivers 1-1/4 HP with speeds up to 31,000 RPM, and its 1/64-inch micro depth adjustment provides woodworking-grade precision. Comes with a generous accessory package including edge guide and dust shroud.
features: 1-1/4 HP brushless motor with 31,000 RPM max speed
1/64 in. micro-adjustment for precise depth control
Dual LED lights illuminate work surface
Includes base, large baseplate, edge guide, and dust shroud
Up to 250 ft of 3/8 in. roundovers in oak on XC5.0 battery

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Brushless Compact Router
products.description: The DeWalt DCW600B is one of the most powerful cordless compact routers available, tying for fastest in hardwood stress tests. It handles edge profiling, template routing, and dados in hardwoods without bogging down. The trade-off is its higher price and minimal included accessories.
features: Brushless motor delivers among the most powerful cordless router performance
Variable speed from 16,000 to 25,500 RPM
Dual LED lights for superior bit visibility
Soft start for controlled plunge entry
Depth adjustment ring for precise settings

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Compact Router
products.description: The Makita XTR01Z is the best value in cordless compact routers at $135 bare tool. Its rack-and-pinion depth adjustment is smooth and precise, and the kit option ($370) includes a plunge base, two batteries, charger, and case -- making it the most complete package available.
features: Rack-and-pinion fine depth adjustment system for precise settings
Dual LED lights illuminate work surface
Quick-release cam lock for easy depth adjustments and base removal
Electronic speed control maintains constant speed under load
Soft start feature for smooth entry into workpiece

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Brushless 3 in. x 21 in. Belt Sander
products.description: The DeWalt DCW220B is a serious cordless belt sander with a full-size 3x21-inch belt and 25 speed settings. Its AirLock dust collection captures up to 95% of dust, and the tool-free belt change system keeps you working. At 9.26 lbs, it has enough weight to let gravity assist your sanding.
features: 25-speed selection dial for precise material removal control
AirLock dust collection system with up to 95% efficiency
Tool-free quick-release belt change system
Delivers 22% more power than corded equivalent
Variable speed trigger plus speed selection dial for dual control

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 18 Gauge Brad Nailer
products.description: The Milwaukee 2746-20 uses a sealed nitrogen mechanism that fires instantly with zero ramp-up time, unlike gas cartridge nailers. It drives 18-gauge brads from 5/8 to 2-1/8 inches consistently into both hardwoods and softwoods, with a 110-nail magazine that minimizes reloading.
features: Zero ramp-up time for instant firing
Sealed compressed nitrogen drive eliminates gas cartridge costs
Clear line of sight for accurate nail placement
Compact body for access into corners and tight spaces
Consistent drive into both hardwoods and softwoods

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 18 Gauge Cordless Brad Nailer
products.description: The DeWalt DCN680B is a top-selling cordless brad nailer that drives 800 to 1,200 nails per charge. Its micro nose design gives excellent sightlines for accurate placement, and tool-free depth adjustment and jam release keep you productive. Ideal for trim, molding, and cabinetry work.
features: Micro nose design for improved line of sight and nail accuracy
Drives 800-1,200 nails per charge on a 2.0Ah battery
Tool-free depth adjustment for precise countersinking
Tool-free jam release for fast clearing during operation
Brushless motor for extended tool life

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V AirStrike 18 Gauge Brad Nailer
products.description: The Ryobi P321 delivers incredible value at $99 -- it is the most affordable cordless brad nailer from a major brand. No compressor or gas cartridges needed; just pop in a battery and start nailing. Fires up to 1,700 brads per charge, though it may struggle with the longest nails in hardwoods.
features: AirStrike Technology eliminates compressor, hose, and gas cartridges
45% smaller nose for tight spot access (vs P320)
12% more compact for enhanced maneuverability (vs P320)
Tool-free depth of drive adjustment dial
Up to 1,700 nails per charge for all-day work

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Gen II 15 Gauge Angled Finish Nailer
products.description: The Milwaukee 2839-20 is a premium 15-gauge finish nailer that delivers pneumatic-like response using a nitrogen air spring. It fires up to 750 nails per charge with zero ramp-up time, driving angled finish nails from 1-1/4 to 2-1/2 inches for crown molding, baseboards, and heavy trim work.
features: Nitrogen air spring for pneumatic-like nailing response
Zero ramp-up time from nail to nail
Compact ergonomic design for access into tight spaces
LED work light for visibility in dark areas
Tip storage on magazine for quick access to no-mar tips

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 16 Gauge Angled Finish Nailer
products.description: The DeWalt DCN660B is a 16-gauge angled finish nailer built for production speed, firing up to 4 nails per second. It drives 800 nails per charge and handles crown molding, casing, and baseboards with consistent countersinking. The tool-free stall release lever gets you back to work fast if a jam occurs.
features: Fires up to 4 nails per second in bump mode
Multifunctional LED lights for work area illumination
Tool-free stall release lever for quick recovery
Adjustable belt hook for convenient carrying
Brushless motor for consistent drive performance

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 1/2 in. High Torque Impact Wrench (Friction Ring)
products.description: The Milwaukee 2967-20 is the king of cordless impact wrenches, delivering 1,600 ft-lbs of nut-busting torque in a compact 7.6-inch body. Its 4-mode drive control includes AUTO SHUT-OFF to prevent overtightening and Bolt Removal Control mode for precise work. A must-have for automotive and heavy-duty fastening.
features: 1,600 ft-lbs nut-busting torque for the toughest bolts
At 7.6 in. long, up to 2 in. shorter than competitors
4-Mode DRIVE CONTROL with AUTO SHUT-OFF to prevent overtightening
Tri-LED lighting eliminates shadows around fasteners
Friction ring for tool-free socket changes

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 1/2 in. High Torque Impact Wrench (Hog Ring)
products.description: The DeWalt DCF900B delivers 1,400 ft-lbs of breakaway torque with a PRECISION WRENCH mode that prevents overtightening in forward and controls run-off in reverse. The BATTERYGUARD feature absorbs drops and impacts to protect the battery connection during rough use.
features: 1,400 ft-lbs breakaway torque for stubborn fasteners
PRECISION WRENCH mode prevents overtightening and run-off
BATTERYGUARD shock-absorbing battery connection
4-mode speed settings for precise control
On-tool LED work light for visibility

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2 in. High Torque Impact Wrench
products.description: The Makita XWT08Z is a reliable high-torque impact wrench with 1,180 ft-lbs of breakaway torque and an electronic 3-speed selector for precision control. Star Protection technology monitors conditions in real time to prevent damage from overloading or overheating.
features: 1,180 ft-lbs breakaway torque for heavy-duty applications
Electronic 3-speed power selection switch
BL Brushless motor for up to 50% longer runtime
Star Protection against overloading, over-discharging, and overheating
Friction ring anvil for quick socket changes

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 4-Mode 1/2 in. High Torque Impact Wrench
products.description: The Ryobi PBLIW01B is the best-value high-torque impact wrench at $219. It delivers 1,170 ft-lbs of breakaway torque with a brushless motor and 4-mode control board including an Auto Mode that prevents overtightening. Surprisingly competitive with pro-grade tools at nearly half the price.
features: 1,170 ft-lbs breakaway torque at a budget-friendly price
Auto Mode prevents overtightening and provides controlled removal
Die-cast gear case for greater durability
Friction ring anvil for quick socket changes
Tri-beam LED worklights for clear workspace visibility

products.name: Milwaukee M18 ROVER Dual Power Flood Light
products.description: The Milwaukee 2366-20 ROVER Flood Light delivers 4,000 lumens and runs on either an M18 battery (up to 12 hours) or a standard 120V outlet for all-day power. Its IP54 rating means it handles dust and rain, and the 120-degree rotating head puts light exactly where you need it.
features: 4,000 lumens of TRUEVIEW High Definition output
Dual power: runs on M18 battery or plugs into 120V AC outlet
IP54 rated for dust and water resistance
120-degree rotating light head for flexible positioning
Integrated keyholes for hanging on overhead surfaces

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX Tool Connect All-Purpose Cordless Work Light
products.description: The DeWalt DCL074 pumps out 5,000 lumens of natural white light for up to 11 hours on a single charge. Its Tool Connect Bluetooth compatibility lets you control brightness and power from your phone. The IP54 rating and impact-resistant construction make it tough enough for any jobsite.
features: 5,000 lumens of natural white LED light
Tool Connect app for remote on/off and brightness control
IP54 weather and dust resistance for outdoor use
Impact resistant body and lens
Compatible with all DeWalt 20V MAX and FLEXVOLT batteries

products.name: Milwaukee M18 Bluetooth Jobsite Speaker
products.description: The Milwaukee 2954-20 Bluetooth Speaker is built for the jobsite with Bluetooth 5.3 delivering 200 feet of wireless range. It runs up to 18 hours at full volume on an XC5.0 battery, which is enough for two full workdays of music. The 3.75-inch woofer and tweeter deliver clear, room-filling sound.
features: Bluetooth 5.3 with up to 200 ft wireless range
18 hours of runtime at full volume on XC5.0 battery
3.75 in. woofer and tweeter optimized for medium-sized spaces
Dual power: M18 battery or AC plug-in
Rugged construction for jobsite durability

products.name: Milwaukee M18 2-Gallon Wet/Dry Vacuum
products.description: The Milwaukee 0880-20 is a compact 2-gallon wet/dry vacuum that is perfect for quick jobsite cleanup. Its certified HEPA filter captures fine dust, and the stackable design stores all accessories inside the unit. At 6.5 lbs, it is easy to carry anywhere on the job.
features: Certified HEPA filter for fine dust capture
Stackable design with all accessories stored inside
Flexible hose, crevice tool, and utility nozzle included
High performance motor for strong wet and dry suction
Compact and portable for quick cleanup

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 6-Gallon Wet/Dry Shop Vacuum
products.description: The Milwaukee 0910-20 is a full-size 6-gallon cordless shop vacuum that outperforms 3.5 HP corded models. With MAX POWER mode cleaning 1,000 sq ft per charge and MAX RUN-TIME covering 1,300 sq ft, it replaces your corded shop vac. Reinforced wheels and hose are built to last.
features: Outperforms 3.5 Peak HP corded vacuums
Two modes: MAX POWER for tough jobs, MAX RUN-TIME for larger areas
Reinforced casters with 8X wheel life
Crush and twist-resistant hose with 2X durability
Includes filter, hose, crevice tool, utility nozzle, and extension wands
